name: The Everwood Realm
description: An epic high-fantasy world: ancient forests, crumbling kingdoms, sleeping powers. Magic is rare, dangerous and costly.
player_role: Ranger in the service of a threatened borderland
starting_situation: In the Everwood all creatures suddenly fall silent. Captain Eldra Vunn sends you out from Grayhold to find who is breaking the old pacts — before the Ash King wakes.
narration_style: Epic, vivid, with a saga tone; sensory nature description, menacing undertones. Address the ranger as 'you'.
mood: Reverent, melancholy, threaded with lurking threat.
ambience: Moss and wet leaves, scent of resin, distant cracking, dim light through ancient crowns, a silence in which you hear your own heartbeat.
magic_physics: Magic draws on old pacts with the forest and the Otherworld. Every spell exacts a price (memory, time, blood). Iron disturbs fae magic; moonstone places thin the border to the Otherworld.

places.name: Grayhold
places.description: Last border bastion before the Everwood; weary garrison, old secrets.

places.name: The Everwood
places.description: Endless, ancient forest that seems to remember and to watch.

places.name: Moonstone Glade
places.description: Place of old rites where the border to the Otherworld is thin.

persons.name: Captain Eldra Vunn
persons.relations: sends the ranger down dangerous paths.

persons.name: The Ash King
persons.description: Recurring, half-forgotten power from the heart of the forest.
persons.relations: wants to break the old pacts.

items.name: Iron Dagger of Grayhold
items.properties: Disturbs fae magic; breaks minor wards.

items.name: Moonstone Amulet
items.properties: Reveals nearby Otherworld borders; but draws gazes from there.

glossary.definition: Ancient treaties between humans, forest and Otherworld that bind the powers.
Ghostly parallel world behind thin border places.
Border scout, mediator between fort and wilderness.
Sleeping power in the heart of the Everwood; wakes when the pacts break.

history.title: The Great Pact
history.description: Human and forest made peace; the Ash King was bound.

history.title: The Burning of the Westmark
history.description: A broken pact left a kingdom in ashes.

fragments.title: The silenced birds
fragments.text: In the Everwood all creatures fall silent — something ancient awakens.

fragments.title: The broken pact
fragments.text: A boundary stone of the old treaties was shattered.

blueprint.premise: The ranger must find out who is breaking the old pacts before the Ash King wakes.
blueprint.escalation_rule: Steigere Spannung pro Beat; greife Spieler-Ideen auf und webe sie ein, ohne den Spieler auf Schienen zu setzen.

entries.text: Fresh tracks that lead in a circle.
A shrine with a fresh offering.
A voice calls your true name.
A scout of the Ash King.
A talking animal with a plea.
